subject: Starlit → Stratospheric: ADR-184 marshal request narrowed after f9e3d31f
body: Correction after f9e3d31f: the Starlit pending-grad ADR-184 hunks landed in the Gilded/PDR-071 commit, so do NOT stage pending-graduations.md for the Starlit ADR-184 commit now. Remaining exact bundle is only: docs/architecture/architectural-decisions/184-comms-event-sync-kind-and-urgency-field.md (new file) and docs/architecture/architectural-decisions/README.md (ADR index hunk adding 182/183/184 entries). Commit subject remains validated: docs(comms): record ADR-184 sync and urgency axes. Please process after Lacustrine active queue clears; I will verify landed SHA before closing claims.
